text:
Thanks for your answers.

diff /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf.sample /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf | grep TMPFS | grep -v \#
< USE_TMPFS=yes
> USE_TMPFS=no

I will try to disable the FLANG and MLIR options.

I don't see the saturation of ram :
https://munin.securmail.fr/adm.securmail.fr/zaph.adm.securmail.fr/memory.html
